reasonCodes.description: The frozen seq_141 attachment policy could not be loaded or validated.
The file extension is not on the strict allow-list.
The MIME family is not on the strict allow-list.
The file exceeds the accepted byte ceiling.
The simulated scanner detected malware or unsafe content.
The upload checksum or byte integrity failed verification.
The payload reached quarantine but could not be decoded safely.
Scanning timed out and the attachment remains blocked pending retry.
A non-authoritative preview derivative failed even though the source file stayed safe.
A duplicate upload replayed to the existing attachment lineage.
The attachment was explicitly removed from the active draft attachment list.
The attachment was superseded by an explicit replacement capture.
Direct upload transport did not settle into quarantine storage.
Artifact access must resolve through governed grants instead of raw storage URLs.
